headline: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 release anchors the quarter as agent orchestration and context management lead the field.
body: Anthropic shipped the Mythos model family alongside Claude Fable 5, with Fable 5 free on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22 before usage credits apply. Demos span autonomous Factorio play, first-principles solar-system simulation and eclipse prediction, music-synced fluid simulation, and a self-built browser CAD editor with an AI copilot. Agent orchestration and context management hold the highest ratios while both weaken on momentum, and token efficiency, prompt caching, and cache hit rate lag, pointing to a maturing infrastructure layer. New entrants include auto-scaling, Ulysses, percolation, and filter propagation, while RAG debate reframes retrieval around vector search, caching, and agent-driven iteration.
